headlines.description: A brace from Erling Haaland helped Manchester City beat Crystal Palace 3-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Erling Haaland scores twice as Manchester City sink Palace at Selhurst Park

headlines.description: Tottenham goalkeeper Guglielmo Vicario had an afternoon to forget as his side suffered a dismal 3-0 defeat at Nottingham Forest.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nottingham Forest outclass Thomas Frank's lacklustre Tottenham

headlines.description: Nick Woltemade's own goal earned Sunderland the Wear-Tyne derby spoils with a 1-0 win over Newcastle.
headlines.shortLinkText: Nick Woltemade own goal sees Sunderland edge Newcastle

events.name: Aston Villa at West Ham United

headlines.description: Morgan Rogers scored a brace to keep Aston Villa firmly in the Premier League title chase with a 3-2 comeback win at West Ham.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rogers brace sees Villa extend winning run to nine in a row

headlines.description: Dominic Calvert-Lewin scored for a fourth-consecutive match to end Leeds' away-day blues with a 1-1 Premier League draw at Brentford.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dominic Calvert-Lewin goal helps Leeds rescue point at Brentford
